content.full_text:
September 5, 1990

California Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

Attention: Legal Department

Re: Confirmation of Telephone Conversation with Peggy Bernardy, September 5, 1990

Dear Legal Department:

Please consider this letter a request for written confirmation of the advice given to me over the telephone by Ms. Bernardy of your office during the above captioned conversation. I understand that it is the Commission's view, pending the issuance of regulations on the subject, that a donation of surplus campaign funds by an unsuccessful candidate for office to a municipal police officers association, which funds would be used to compensate the families of police officers killed in the line of duty, constitutes a qualified donation to a bona fide charitable, education, civic, religious, or similar tax-exempt nonprofit organization under Government Code section 85807(c).

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Please do not hesitate to contact the undersigned if you have any questions or concerns.

Sincerely,

MARK L. HEFTER
